allow: PowerShell($body = '{"email":"devtest730@gmail.com","password":"TESTDEV123","full_name":"Test Dev","role":"client","confirm_password":"TESTDEV123"}'; try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/v1/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "BODY: $\($response.Content\)" } catch { Write-Output "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output "BODY: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"email":"devtest730@gmail.com","password":"TESTDEV123","full_name":"Test Dev","role":"client","confirm_password":"TESTDEV123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:4000/api/v1/auth/register" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -UseBasicParsing; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; "BODY: $\($r.Content\)" } catch { $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\)\); "STATUS: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)"; "BODY: $\($reader.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })

Bash(node -e "const en = require\('./frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json'\); const ar = require\('./frontend/src/i18n/locales/ar.json'\); const enKeys = JSON.stringify\(en, null, 2\); const arKeys = JSON.stringify\(ar, null, 2\); const flatten = \(obj, prefix=''\) => Object.keys\(obj\).reduce\(\(acc, k\) => { const val = obj[k]; const key = prefix ? prefix+'.'+k : k; if \(typeof val === 'object' && val !== null\) Object.assign\(acc, flatten\(val, key\)\); else acc[key]=val; return acc; }, {}\); const enFlat = flatten\(en\); const arFlat = flatten\(ar\); const enOnlyKeys = Object.keys\(enFlat\).filter\(k => !\(k in arFlat\)\); const arOnlyKeys = Object.keys\(arFlat\).filter\(k => !\(k in enFlat\)\); console.log\('Keys in EN only:', enOnlyKeys.length, enOnlyKeys.slice\(0,20\).join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Keys in AR only:', arOnlyKeys.length, arOnlyKeys.slice\(0,20\).join\(', '\)\);")

Bash(node -e "try { JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('en.json: VALID'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\('en.json ERROR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(node -e "const en=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('frontend/src/i18n/locales/en.json','utf8'\)\); const ar=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('frontend/src/i18n/locales/ar.json','utf8'\)\); const checks=['orders.seller.subtitle','orders.seller.incomingTab','sellerDashboard.setupTitle','home.featured.new','home.sellers.empty','seller.since','common.goBack','common.weeksAgo','product.price','product.reviews.signIn','sellerProducts.deleted','sellerProducts.form.uploadBtn']; let ok=true; checks.forEach\(k=>{ const parts=k.split\('.'\); let ev=en,av=ar; for\(const p of parts\){ev=ev?.[p];av=av?.[p];} if\(!ev\)console.error\('MISSING en:'+k\); if\(!av\)console.error\('MISSING ar:'+k\); if\(ev&&av\)console.log\('OK: '+k\); }\)")
